title: Create GH issue to debug Pages CD workflow failure

comments.author: m1
comments.content: Found the failure: Deploy Documentation workflow (run 22528527456) fails at the Render step. YAML parse error in docs_src/_brand.yml line 27 — bad indentation on the monospace family value. The comma-separated font list needs quoting.

comments.author: m1
comments.content: Created GH issue #91: https://github.com/forecast-bio/crosslink/issues/91 — YAML parse error in _brand.yml line 27, monospace font family value needs proper quoting
